title: Digital Independence
description: Why owning your digital infrastructure matters ... and what platform dependency actually costs you.
intro: Platform dependency is an invisible tax on your time, reach, and long-term position. Every algorithm change, policy shift, or account suspension is a reminder that rented reach is not ownership. Digital independence is not about rejecting platforms ... it is about not depending on any single one.

seo.title: Digital Independence ... AI Now Guide
